As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 215: New Standings Shake-Up, Trust Battles, and Climb/Fall/Stay The standings just shifted—and Around the ACL is breaking down what actually matters. Meesh, Jake, and Anthony kick things off with the biggest surprises in the new rankings, including movement at the top with Colin Hodet holding #1 and pressure building behind him from Mark Richards, Zack Aiken, and Logan Chamberlain. Then, ACL National Director Todd Kisicki joins the show to talk about the ACL Europe Open in Croatia, the next Team USA mixed doubles qualifier, and what’s coming next for league structure. After that, it’s time to make some tough calls in “Who Do You Trust More?”—head-to-head decisions featuring names like Sammy Soto vs Gavin Cano and Matt Guy vs Jamie Graham. We close with Climb / Fall / Stay, predicting what’s next for key players in the standings. Who’s rising? Who’s slipping? And who’s right where they belong? Standings, strategy, and real decisions—this one sets the tone for what’s coming next.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: Fugitive Valley (1941)
programme.desc: The Range Busters pursue a group of outlaws hiding in a remote valley, uncovering a scheme of robbery and murder as they work to track down the fugitives and bring them to justice.

programme.title: Six-Gun Rhythm (1939)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy comes to the aid of a young woman who is being cheated out of her rightful inheritance by a gang of crooked outlaws. Using his musical talents and sharpshooting skills, he works to expose the villains and restore justice.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A cowboy steps in to help a ranching community threatened by a gang trying to take control of local land and cattle. As tensions rise in the Saddle Mountain region, he rallies allies and confronts the outlaws in a fight to restore justice and protect the settlers.

programme.title: Range Warfare (1935)
programme.desc: A cowboy returns to his hometown to find it under the control of a ruthless gang, and sets out to expose their crimes and restore order with the help of loyal allies

programme.title: Songs and Saddles (1938)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy becomes involved in a range dispute when a group of outlaws tries to force settlers off their land. Using his musical charm and sharpshooting skills, he works to protect the innocent and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Mclintock! 1963
programme.desc: John Wayne leads the charge in McLintock!, a rip-roaring Western comedy brimming with action, romance, and frontier spirit. As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.

programme.title: Guns Of Diablo 1964
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as rugged scout Linc Murdock, caught in a feud with rancher Rance Macklin over the enchanting Maria. Packed with action, rivalry, and frontier grit, this Western drama also showcases a young Kurt Russell in one of his earliest roles!

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon
programme.desc: Maynard hears the cry of the weird masked "phantom" of Tombstone Canyon. The plot thickens when Maynard discovers a man with a key to his past has been murdered by the phantom

programme.title: Son of the Renegade 1953
programme.desc: In Son of the Renegade, cowboy star Johnny Carpenter saddles up for a tale of legacy and justice. As the son of a notorious outlaw, he fights to escape the shadow of his father’s crimes and prove himself a man of honor. With outlaws closing in and the law on his trail, he takes a stand to defend the innocent and clear his name. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes drama, and frontier grit, this Western asks—can the son of a renegade carve out a destiny of his own?

programme.desc: During the Civil War an Irish Union soldier attempts to flee for his homeland.
